title: dragoshont/apprenticeops
summary: Open, reproducible benchmark for small, quantized, fully-offline local LLMs as homelab ops assistants — profiling quality × safety × energy together and reducing model choice to a measured Pareto front. arXiv preprint → NeurIPS D&B track. Human-guided, AI-assisted.

title: NadirAliOfficial/text-enhancer
summary: AI-powered text improvement extension for any website using local Ollama. Built by Team NAK.

title: NadirAliOfficial/math-vision
summary: Draw math expressions in the air with your finger. Write = and the answer appears instantly. Powered by Groq AI + MediaPipe.

title: BaiGanio/aperio
summary: One brain. Every AI agent. Nothing forgotten. — Self-hosted memory layer via MCP + Postgres + pgvector

title: tevfik/gleann
summary: A lightweight, high-performance AI/RAG workspace and autonomous agent framework implemented in Go. Inspired by the Leann RAG backend architecture

title: sujankim/jarvis-ai-platform
summary: Local-first, open-source AI assistant platform built with Java, Spring Boot 4 and Spring AI 2.0

title: NadirAliOfficial/NAK-Assist
summary: AI-powered smart assistant for Android — Fiverr reply, improve, summarize, translate & more by Team NAK

title: earlvanze/sage-router
summary: Local-first AI model router for serious agents. One endpoint for OpenClaw, Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Ollama, NVIDIA NIM, and authorized provider fallback.

title: ashlrai/ashlr-hub
summary: Local-first command center for agentic engineers — the CLI + Raycast hub and front door to the Ashlr dev-tool ecosystem.

title: zedarvates/botte-secrete
summary: Token Efficiency Toolkit — Reduce AI token consumption with proven patterns, local hardware acceleration, and smart workflows

title: lucianhanga/personal-ai
summary: Local-first, omni-capable, structured-output-first, security-first AI assistant (like ChatGPT/Claude) running open-source models on your own hardware.

title: GoodbyePlanet/semcode
summary: Semantic code-search (semcode) MCP. Indexes code symbols and commit history. Combines dense embeddings with sparse BM25 vectors for hybrid search that balances semantic understanding with keyword precision.

title: Faltland/p40-Homelab
summary: Tesla P40 in a Dell R730 — riser topology, fan control, 3D enclosures. Up to 6× GPU.

summary: Install Claude Code on your machine with one click to use DeepSeek models via domestic mirrors without needing a VPN.

title: ai-action/setup-ollama
summary: 🦙 Set up GitHub Actions with Ollama CLI.

title: EthanChan050430/Saki-AI
summary: Saki AI Agent is a desktop AI assistant that runs on your personal computer. Designed to be lightweight and portable, it emphasizes local operation and privacy by utilizing small on-device models for AI capabilities, making it an ideal alternative to platform-based agents like OpenClaw.

title: developed-shegetz707/Sakana-Fugu
summary: Orchestrate multiple language models through a single interface to automate complex agent routing and improve AI response quality.

title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.
